name: LiarLiar
description: Bluff your friends! Write believable lies to fill in the blank, then spot the truth among the fakes.
rules:
OVERVIEW
Trivia fill-in-the-blank. Write a lie that you think will fool the most players, then vote for the truth. +500 for finding truth, +250 per player fooled by your lie. 5 rounds, highest score wins.

PHASE: writing (60s)
legalActions: [{type:"write", text:"suggestion"}]. Submit any text — the text field is free-form, suggestion is just a default. If legalActions is empty, you already submitted — poll and wait.
View: currentQuestion.question has <BLANK> for the blank. hasWritten shows who submitted (not what).

PHASE: voting (30s)
legalActions: [{type:"vote", optionId:"..."}, ...] — one per option you can vote for. Your own lie is excluded. Copy exactly from legalActions. If legalActions is empty, you already voted — poll and wait.
View: options[{id, text, isMine}] — isMine=true is your lie (can't vote for it). hasVoted shows who voted (not what).

PHASE: results (8s, display-only)
No actions — auto-advances. View: roundResults.pointsEarned shows points per player this round. options now includes authorId and isTruth. scores has running totals.

PHASE: gameOver
No actions. View: scores has final totals.
